ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_bins" (
  "bin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the genomic bin */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Percentage of completeness of the bin */,
  "contamination" REAL /* Percentage of contamination in the bin */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the bin */,
  "coding_density" REAL /* Coding density of the bin */,
  "assembly_length" INTEGER /* Length of the assembled genome in base pairs */,
  "estimated_genome_size" REAL /* Estimated size of the genome in base pairs */,
  "new_taxonomy" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the bin in the format d__domain;p__phylum;c__class;o__order;f__family;g__genus;s__species */,
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ecosystem where the bin was derived */,
  "num_contigs" INTEGER /* Number of contigs in the assembly */,
  "n50" INTEGER /* N50 value of the assembly */,
  "l50" INTEGER /* L50 value of the assembly */,
  "longest_contig" INTEGER /* Length of the longest contig */,
  "shortest_contig" INTEGER /* Length of the shortest contig */,
  "avg_contig_len" REAL /* Average length of contigs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_bins_ecosystem_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecosystem_id") REFERENCES ecosystems ("ecosystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecosystems" (
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecosystem */,
  "ecosystem_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecosystem */,
  "ecosystem_category" TEXT /* Category of the ecosystem (e.g., Host-associated, Environmental) */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of the ecosystem (e.g., Digestive system, Marine, Non-marine Saline and Alkaline) */,
  "ecosystem_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the ecosystem (e.g., Gut, Oral cavity, Oceanic, Hypersaline) */,
  "specific_ecosystem" TEXT /* Specific ecosystem (e.g., Termite gut, Human oral, Marine, Hypersaline lake sediment) */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the ecosystem is found */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the ecosystem */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range of the ecosystem */,
  "ph_range" TEXT /* pH range of the ecosystem */,
  "salinity_range" TEXT /* Salinity range of the ecosystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecosystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mOTUs" (
  "mOTU_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mOTU */,
  "mOTU_name" TEXT /* Name of the mOTU */,
  "mOTU_description" TEXT /* Description of the mOTU */,
  "mOTU_type" TEXT /* Type of the mOTU (e.g., bacterial, archaeal, eukaryotic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mOTU_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_classifications" (
  "bin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the genomic bin */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the taxonomic classification */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the taxonomic classification */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the taxonomic classification */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the taxonomic classification */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the taxonomic classification */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the taxonomic classification */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the taxonomic classification */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the classification (e.g., domain, phylum, class, order, family, genus, species) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bin_id" TEXT /* ID of the genomic bin being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bin */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bin was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "bin_id" TEXT /* ID of the genomic bin the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., assembly, annotation, raw data) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., FASTA, GenBank, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "bin_id" TEXT /* ID of the genomic bin the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., assembly, annotation, raw data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "bin_id" TEXT /* ID of the genomic bin the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  "annotation_data" TEXT /* Data of the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., database, publication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "bin_id" TEXT /* ID of the genomic bin the publication is related to */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "bin_id" TEXT /* ID of the genomic bin the project is related to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the agency is supporting */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "agency_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the funding agency */,
  "agency_url" TEXT /* URL of the funding agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_agencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
